title: Termite Treatment in Melrose, Bronx | $800 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment in Melrose, Bronx starting at $800. Protect your home from termite damage with Best Pest Control NYC's expert solutions. Call today!
intro: Melrose residents face unique termite challenges due to the neighborhood's mix of pre-war buildings and wooden structures. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive termite treatment services throughout Melrose, protecting homes and businesses from costly structural damage. Our proven methods ensure complete termite elimination with prices ranging from $800 to $4,000 depending on infestation severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of termite expertise to Melrose properties, with same-day service available throughout the Bronx. Our licensed technicians use advanced detection technology and eco-friendly treatments that are safe for families and pets while delivering guaranteed results.
localContext: Melrose's proximity to St. Mary's Park and the high concentration of multi-family brownstones and older residential buildings make termite prevention critical in this South Bronx neighborhood. The area's historic architecture along Melrose Avenue and nearby Elton Avenue requires specialized termite protection to preserve property values and structural integrity.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Melrose, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Melrose typically ranges from $800 for minor localized infestations to $4,000 for severe whole-property treatments. The final cost depends on the extent of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do I know if my Melrose home has termites?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, mud tubes along foundation walls, discarded wings near windows, and visible wood damage. Melrose's older buildings are particularly susceptible. Our technicians provide thorough inspections using moisture meters and infrared technology to detect hidden infestations before they cause major damage.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Melrose properties?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Melrose are completed in 1-2 days depending on property size and treatment type. Liquid barrier treatments typically take 4-6 hours, while bait station installations are faster. We work efficiently to minimize disruption while ensuring complete protection for your home or building.

faqs.question: Are termite treatments safe for families in Melrose apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved termiticides that are safe when properly applied by our certified technicians. For multi-family buildings common in Melrose, we coordinate treatments to ensure resident safety and can schedule work when tenants are away. Our products are low-odor and designed for indoor residential use.
